title: bus.tengine.biome_layer_applied v1
description: When: A biome layer is applied to the terrain fossil silo during shadergen session initialization. Source: /tengine.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

silo.description: Silo identifier this event originates from.

signal.description: Panic signal or error code that triggered the crash.

last_frame.description: Frame counter at time of crash; last successfully rendered frame before failure.

stderr_tail.description: Last 20 lines of stderr or log output captured at crash time, providing context for debugging.

nvidia_tdr.description: True when the crash was triggered by NVIDIA Timeout Detection and Recovery; indicates a GPU hardware timeout rather than a software error.

vk_error_code.description: Vulkan error code returned by the driver at time of crash; 0 means no Vulkan error was recorded.
